name: Breadmaker Dog Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the dry ingredients (flour, oats, and cornmeal) to the bread machine pan.
2. Pour in the liquid mixture (beaten egg, water or milk, and olive oil if using).
3. Select the dough cycle on your bread machine and start the mix.
4. Once mixing is complete, carefully remove the dough from the machine.
5. Roll out or pat the dough into biscuit-sized pieces.
6. Place the biscuits on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for about 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
8. Allow the biscuits to cool completely before serving them to your dog.
